user.title: Weather Plus
user.description: Wraps a weather entity's hourly forecast and exposes day/daytime/night high/low sensors.

data.sun_entity: Sun entity (used when boundary is sunrise / sunset)
data.dual_unit: Emit both Fahrenheit and Celsius sensors (adds current temperature)

data_description.daytime_mode: Fixed hours use the values below; Sunrise / sunset uses Home Assistant's location.
data_description.enable_conditions: Adds binary sensors like today_rain, today_cold, hour_lightning derived from the hourly forecast.

error.invalid_window: Daytime end must be after daytime start.
error.invalid_thresholds: Hot threshold must be greater than cold threshold.

abort.already_configured: This weather entity is already configured.

data.sun_entity: Sun entity (used when boundary is sunrise / sunset)
data.dual_unit: Emit both Fahrenheit and Celsius sensors (adds current temperature)

error.invalid_window: Daytime end must be after daytime start.
error.invalid_thresholds: Hot threshold must be greater than cold threshold.

reset_extremes.name: Reset extremes
reset_extremes.description: Clear the carry-forward day/daytime/night high/low cache and trigger a refresh.
